functions.title: Guide Book #68
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #68§r
§lSkeleton Miner§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lVariants§r: 10
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Skeleton, Undead, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: Custom mineshafts.
•§lHealth§r: 20-32

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Bone, Coal, Raw Copper, Raw Gold, Raw Iron, Redstone, Lapis Lazuli, Amethyst Shard, Emerald, Diamond, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Cave Wolf, Wolf.

•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Villagers, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lEquipped weapon§r: Random Pickaxe
•§lEquipped armor§r: Random Helmet
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 3
•Can burn in daylight.

•Can randomly sit.
•Can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
•Can pick up weapons and equip it.
•Can pick up armor and equip it.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Lurking in custom mineshafts, the Skeleton Miner is a hostile undead worker cursed to endlessly dig. Armed with a random pickaxe and a helmet for protection, it attacks intruders with steady force. Though vulnerable to sunlight,
this skeleton can sit to slowly regenerate health and may equip better gear it finds. It drops valuable ores and minerals, making it a dangerous but rewarding foe deep underground.§’
